hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "{}" | grep -q "src/.*\.js$" && npx eslint --fix "{}" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'

hooks.prompt: Check if Claude modified any src/ files in this session. If so, verify that npm test and npm run lint were executed and passed. If tests/lint were not run after src/ changes, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Run npm test and npm run lint before finishing."}. If they were run and passed, or no src/ files were modified, respond with {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude Code needs your attention' 2>/dev/null || true
